# Kicksnare Digital

> A small team of specialists shipping websites, digital products, and growth experiments that turn traffic into revenue. No long-term retainers.

## About

Kicksnare Digital is a UK-based web design and growth agency founded by OO, a product manager with seven years of retail experience. The agency builds fast-turnaround websites and runs growth experiments for small service businesses — consultants, coaches, local professionals — who need a professional online presence that generates enquiries.

## Services

- **The 48-Hour Launch Site**: Professional 5-page website designed and built in 48 hours, including all copywriting, mobile optimisation, and SEO setup.
- **SEO & Google Business Profile Setup**: Search engine optimisation and Google Business Profile configuration for local visibility.
- **Hosting & Maintenance**: Ongoing hosting, maintenance, and one update per month.

## Case Studies

- **Halocrate** (B2B SaaS / Devtools): -41% bounce rate on /pricing, 2.6x demo bookings.
- **Northbeam DTC** (DTC / Apparel): 3.1x ROAS, -34% CAC.
- **Studio Mara** (Wellness / Multi-location): -26% no-shows, +38% local organic traffic.

## Guarantee

If you don't love it, you don't pay. No questions.
